title: Information from Board 1, Mirrored in Board 2 + Create Email Templates
excerpt:

posts.author: JohnTMF (John)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m trying to create email templates in Board 2, using mirrored information from Board 1. The mirrored Column fields from Board 1 however do not seem to appear as fields that can be auto-populated in the template. Only the non-mirrored fields from Board 2 appear.

Example:
Board 1 contains:
-Name
-Surname

Board 2:
-Name (mirrored from board 1)
-Surname (mirrored from board 1)
-Address

Added a simplified example of the Template Email I’m trying to create inside Board 2 using the “Emails & Activities” function.

Dear (Name) and (Surname),

Thank you for confirming your address is (address).

Best wishes,
John

Thank you for your guidance.
Best wishes
John
